messages.content:
write more :""* KPI are monitored  on a daily basis to ensure there's no breach against EMT P&P
* Till now no pre-underwriting reports required for contingency line of business.
* Ensuring that our data is up to date and ready once required.  
* A big number of backlogs of first half of the year were finalized and our records now are up to date "

* Additionally, we have implemented regular audits to ensure compliance with EMT P&P and identify any potential areas of improvement.
* We have successfully streamlined our processes to minimize the need for pre-underwriting reports in the contingency line of business, saving time and resources.
* Through ongoing data management efforts, we have ensured that our information is always accurate, reliable, and readily accessible when needed.
* Our dedicated team has worked diligently to address the backlog of cases from the first half of the year, ensuring that all records are now fully up to date.
* Furthermore, we have implemented measures to improve our efficiency and reduce the occurrence of backlogs in the future.
* Regular team meetings and trainings are conducted to foster communication, enhance knowledge sharing, and stay updated on the latest industry trends and best practices.
* Our commitment to continuous improvement drives us to constantly analyze our KPIs, identify areas for enhancement, and implement targeted strategies to optimize our performance.
* We strive to maintain a high level of professionalism, ensuring that all employees adhere to EMT P&P and conduct their work with the utmost integrity.
* Customer satisfaction surveys are regularly conducted to gauge the level of service provided and identify areas where we can further exceed customer expectations.
* Our strong focus on quality assurance allows us to consistently deliver accurate and reliable results, providing peace of mind to our clients and stakeholders.

write more: "I've completed 6 months working with the exposure management team. Every day I'm doing my best to increase my knowledge by checking new scenarios and practicing it by myself. Looking forward as well to having a good knowledge of other lines in exposure management.".

* Over the past 6 months, I have actively engaged with the exposure management team, seeking opportunities to expand my knowledge and enhance my skills. By immersing myself in different scenarios and actively practicing, I have been able to increase my expertise in this field.
* Moving forward, I am eager to broaden my understanding by delving into other lines of exposure management. I believe that gaining a comprehensive understanding of various lines will not only strengthen my skill set but also enable me to contribute more effectively to the team and organization as a whole.
* During my time with the exposure management team, I have actively sought out feedback and guidance from more experienced colleagues. Their insights and expertise have been invaluable in shaping my development and helping me grow as a professional.
* Additionally, I have taken it upon myself to stay updated on the latest trends and best practices in the field of exposure management. I regularly attend webinars, industry conferences, and workshops to stay abreast of any new developments or emerging strategies.
* I also make a conscious effort to network with professionals in the exposure management field, both internally and externally. Building relationships with industry experts and peers allows me to gain insights, exchange ideas, and foster a collaborative environment for continuous learning.
* As we move forward, I am committed to supporting the exposure management team by actively contributing my ideas, insights, and knowledge to drive both individual and team success. I believe that a proactive and enthusiastic mindset is crucial in delivering exceptional results and achieving our collective goals.
* I am grateful for the opportunities I have had thus far, and I am excited about the future prospects within the exposure management team. I am confident that with dedication, continuous learning, and a growth mindset, I will continue to thrive in this dynamic and rewarding field.

Rephrase: ""* Jira reports are checked in regular basis to ensure that all tasks are updated in proper maner.
* I've started signing off the risks and including my feedback on regularly sign off report.".

* Regularly monitoring Jira reports ensures that all tasks are consistently and accurately updated.
* In regards to risk assessment, I have taken responsibility for signing off on risks and providing valuable feedback on a regular basis.
Rephrase: "I'm always ready to contribute and to support any other team in my department happily.".
* I am always enthusiastic and willing to contribute my support to any other team within my department.

Rephrase:""* I'm always in contact with the underwriters especially that many changes are implemented on how we process contingency risks.
* Regular meeting are held to discuss any concerns.".

* I maintain regular communication with the underwriters, particularly in light of the numerous changes being implemented in our contingency risk processing.
* We regularly schedule meetings to address any concerns and ensure effective collaboration within the team.

Rephrase: "By October I've started signing off the PV Contingency policies as per our policies and procedures to ensure the accuracy of the data captured.
* It was agreed with contingency Underwriters that I'll start of initial review of the data captured on Contingency Agg sheet till end of the year and if all in order this task will be assigned to me by beginning of next year. ".

* As of October, I have commenced signing off on the PV Contingency policies, adhering to our established policies and procedures to guarantee the precision of captured data.
* In collaboration with the contingency underwriters, we have agreed that I will conduct an initial review of the data captured on the Contingency Agg sheet until the end of the year. If everything is in order, this task will be officially assigned to me at the start of next year.

Rephrase: "* I'm ready always to support my senior manager with whatever required.
* I've prepared the Contingency manual process by October.
* I've prepared a study of the possibility of including Contingency product into Sequel Impact, and provided it to my manager.
* We've started exploring the possibility of generating Aggs report. The project still to be finalized.".

* I am always prepared to provide support to my senior manager as needed.
* By October, I completed the preparation of the Contingency manual process.
* I conducted a thorough study on the feasibility of integrating the Contingency product into Sequel Impact and submitted it to my manager.
* We have initiated the exploration of generating Aggs report, although the project has yet to be finalized.

Rephrase: ""* My team's operations is monitored on daily basis and records are kept to be referred to once required.
*  SL movement report is monitored on regular basis to ensure that we're capturing our data accurately
* Jira's Contingency data that was were reviewed, and some amendments were done  (missing fields, not updated properly),  it's an ongoing process to ensure that our record on Jira is reliable.".

* The operations of my team are monitored on a daily basis, and detailed records are maintained for future reference as needed.
* We regularly review the SL movement report to ensure that our data is accurately captured and reflected.
* We have conducted a review of the Contingency data in Jira, making necessary amendments such as filling in missing fields and updating information more accurately. This ongoing process is crucial in maintaining the reliability of our records in Jira.

Rephrase: "* Data captured on Contingency Aggs Database Master sheet are checked on regular basis to ensure the data is processed in the right manner.
*By October I've started sigining off the PV Contingency policies as per our policies and procedures to ensure the accuracy of the data captured.
* It was agreed with ontingency Underwiters that I'll start of initial review of the data captured on Contingecy Agg sheet till end of the year and if all in order this task will be assigned to me by begining of next year. 
* Jira outstanding tasks were updated with  sign off details done by the Underwriters and tickets were closed.".

* Regular checks are conducted on the data entered in the Contingency Aggs Database Master sheet to ensure its accurate processing.
* Starting in October, I began signing off on the PV Contingency policies in accordance with our established policies and procedures, ensuring the precision of the captured data.
* An agreement was reached with the Contingency Underwriters that I would conduct an initial review of the data entered on the Contingency Agg sheet until the end of the year. If all is in order, this task will be officially assigned to me at the beginning of next year.
* The outstanding tasks in Jira were updated with the sign off details provided by the Underwriters, and the corresponding tickets were subsequently closed.

Rephrase: "* KPI are monitored  on a daily basis to ensure there's no breach against EMT P&P
* Till now no pre-underwriting reports required for contingency line of business.
* Ensuring that our data is up to date and ready once required.  
* A big number of backlogs of first half of the year were finalized and our records now are up to date .".

* We diligently monitor our KPIs on a daily basis to ensure strict adherence to EMT P&P without any breaches.
* Currently, no pre-underwriting reports are necessary for the contingency line of business.
* Maintaining up-to-date data readiness is a priority for us, ensuring that it is readily available when needed.
* We have successfully addressed a significant number of backlogs from the first half of the year, bringing our records up to date and improving overall efficiency.
